vocabulary_or_rule: Sample identifier with technical suffix removed: dup -> base sample, B -> base sample.
Ordered vocabulary: no, yes, not_reported. Original code 1=yes, 2=no, blank=not_reported.
Ordered vocabulary: none, douches, protectors, not_reported. Derived from Usa Duchas, Usa Protectores, Ninguno D/P.
Ordered vocabulary: grade_0_not_observed, grade_1, grade_2, grade_3, grade_4. Blank microscopy fields are treated as not observed.
Calculated as weight_kg / height_m^2 when both values are present.
Sum of Lactobacillus, coccobacilli, and Mobiluncus point columns.
Ordered vocabulary: normal for 0-3, intermediate for 4-6, bv for 7-10.
Original NO; Posit; Negativo code retained as code value because source labels are ambiguous.
